notes: ServiceNow for Slack notifications (access requests / RITMs, change requests, major incidents, SecOps alerts). Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. Approval-style cards (access request, change, PO) end with a context footer whose Status is *Pending Approval* and name an approver — leave these UNANSWERED to stage a pending-approval demo beat. Major-incident cards pair a Created card with a Resolved card. Fits ops/incident/security/approvals channels.

examples.name: access_request_pending
examples.when: An access request (RITM) is routed to a manager for approval; left pending on purpose.

fields.text:

elements.text: Status: *Pending Approval*  ·  CI: TBMNC-OPCENTER-PROD  ·  Submitted 2h ago

examples.name: emergency_change_request
examples.when: An out-of-cycle emergency change needs manager authorization before the window can open.

text.text: *Out-of-cycle production patch* — Spring4Shell (CVE-2022-22965) remediation across affected services.
*Affected CIs:* Remote Connect command API (customer-facing) · VSC&L Logistics API (internal). *Approval required from the OneTech Manager before the change window can open.*

elements.text: ServiceNow · Change Management · requested by Adrienne (PCG) · SLA: authorize within 2h

examples.name: major_incident_created
examples.when: A major incident (P1/P2) record is opened during a bridge; pair with a resolved card.

elements.text: ServiceNow · Major Incident · CI: Okta SSO (Plano)
